props.name: items
props.description: Array of ChromaItem objects to display in the grid

props.name: className
props.description: Additional CSS classes to apply to the grid container

props.name: radius
props.description: Size of the spotlight effect in pixels

props.name: damping
props.description: Cursor follow animation duration in seconds

props.name: fadeOut
props.description: Fade-out animation duration in seconds when mouse leaves
